nodes.name: Webhook - Fetch Daily Context
nodes.notes: GET production URL: /webhook/myassist-daily-context when workflow is active. Respond: When Last Node Finishes, First Entry JSON. Same graph as Cron; use for MyAssist web app.

nodes.name: Cron - 01:00 Local
nodes.notes: Runs each day at 01:00 local server time. Adjust in node settings if needed.

nodes.name: Todoist - Get Active Tasks
nodes.notes: authentication=None + header only: avoids duplicate Authorization if a Bearer/Header credential was also attached. Token: $vars.TODOIST_API_TOKEN or attach Header Auth and clear this header in UI. Query limit=200 (API max per page).

nodes.name: Gmail - Get Starred Signals
nodes.notes: readStatus=both: starred mail is often already read; default unread would return empty until the node was reopened. Query still uses label:starred.

nodes.name: Google Calendar - Today Events
nodes.notes: Calendar ID set by email (not primary) so re-import keeps the correct calendar. Change value if the account differs.

nodes.name: Merge Todoist + Gmail
nodes.notes: Append mode: concat streams so 0 Gmail messages does not drop the Todoist branch (combineAll would output 0 items).

nodes.name: Merge With Calendar
nodes.notes: Append: fan-in Calendar with prior branch; empty calendar still passes prior items.

nodes.name: Normalize Aggregated Data
nodes.notes: Terminal output: normalized JSON for Custom GPT (MyAssist Operator). No in-n8n LLM.
